grid.origin_note: row 0 = north edge (y=10000); col 0 = west edge (x=0). cell centre (r,c) at x=125+250c, y=9875-250r

eco_threshold_note: minimum acceptable stream baseflow at GAGE-1; magnitude in m3/d (positive)

caveats.superposition: Map/baseflow under abstraction are LINEAR SUPERPOSITION of unit responses on a mean baseline. Exact only for a linear system; Freyberg water-table cells are mildly nonlinear, so abstraction effects are an approximation. Recharge-level bands come from the full posterior ensemble and ARE rigorous.
caveats.band_source: P10/P90 bands reflect posterior parameter uncertainty at the SELECTED recharge level (no-abstraction baseline). Abstraction-response uncertainty is not in the band unless explicitly toggled.
